name: LangMem
tagline: Long-term memory tools for LangGraph agents that learn from every conversation
seoTitle: LangMem - Long-Term Memory for AI Agents
metaDescription: LangMem is LangChain's memory SDK that lets agents extract, store, and search long-term memories, with native LangGraph integration. Install with pip.
overview: LangMem is a memory SDK from the LangChain team that helps agents remember information across conversations. It gives you tools to pull important details out of a chat, store them, and search them later, so an agent can personalize its replies and stay consistent between sessions.

It is aimed at developers building agents who need long-term memory rather than a fresh start on every request. You can use its core memory API with any storage system, or rely on its built-in integration with LangGraph's long-term memory store.

Within the agent-memory space, LangMem sits as a memory framework. It supports both "hot path" memory (tools the agent calls during a conversation) and background memory management that extracts and consolidates knowledge automatically.
features: Core memory API that works with any storage backend, not just LangGraph
Memory management tools (create_manage_memory_tool, create_search_memory_tool) agents call during a conversation
Background memory manager that extracts, consolidates, and updates knowledge automatically
Native integration with LangGraph's long-term memory store, available in LangGraph Platform deployments
Prompt-refinement tooling to optimize agent behavior over time

gettingStarted.intro: Install LangMem with pip, set an LLM provider API key, then wire its memory tools into a LangGraph agent.

steps.heading: Set your LLM API key
steps.body: Configure an API key for a supported LLM provider in your environment.
steps.code: export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="sk-..."  # Or another supported LLM provider

steps.heading: Create an agent with memory
steps.body: Add the manage- and search-memory tools to a LangGraph react agent backed by a store.
steps.code:
from langgraph.prebuilt import create_react_agent
from langgraph.store.memory import InMemoryStore
from langmem import create_manage_memory_tool, create_search_memory_tool

store = InMemoryStore(
    index={
        "dims": 1536,
        "embed": "openai:text-embedding-3-small",
    }
)

agent = create_react_agent(
    "anthropic:claude-3-5-sonnet-latest",
    tools=[
        create_manage_memory_tool(namespace=("memories",)),
        create_search_memory_tool(namespace=("memories",)),
    ],
    store=store,
)

steps.heading: Store and recall a memory
steps.body: Chat normally; the agent decides what to store and searches its memory when asked.

useCases: Give a chat agent persistent memory of a user's preferences across separate sessions
Let an agent record and search facts in the hot path during an ongoing conversation
Run a background process that consolidates and updates an agent's knowledge over time
Add long-term memory to an existing LangGraph application using its storage layer
